name: knowledge-management
description: Sync your Word docs and Google Docs into a searchable local index Claude can use without loading full files.

documents_path.title: Documents folder
documents_path.description: Local folder to scan for Word documents (.docx). Subfolders are included.

google_docs_enabled.title: Sync Google Docs? (true / false)
google_docs_enabled.description: Set to true to include Google Docs in your knowledge base.

google_drive_folder_id.title: Google Drive folder ID (optional)
google_drive_folder_id.description: Restrict Google Docs sync to a specific folder. Leave empty to include all your docs. Find the folder ID in the URL when you open the folder in Google Drive.

sync_interval_minutes.title: Sync interval (minutes)
sync_interval_minutes.description: How often to check for updated documents when Claude is running. Default: 60.

google_client_id.title: Google OAuth Client ID
google_client_id.description: From Google Cloud Console → APIs & Services → Credentials. See the setup guide in the README.

google_client_secret.title: Google OAuth Client Secret
google_client_secret.description: From Google Cloud Console → APIs & Services → Credentials.
